_comment: imgui-browser launch profiles.  Read by xcm.py (CLI) and by the app at runtime via browser_settings.h.  Edit this file to configure startup defaults or add custom profiles.

defaults._comment: Global defaults applied when a profile does not override a key.

grab_bar._desc: Thin window-drag strip only.  No toolbar, no tab bar.  Minimal chrome -- the webview fills the whole window below the macOS traffic lights.

explore._desc: Full browser chrome.  Tab strip and URL toolbar are both visible.  Starts on about:blank so the user can type any URL or file:// path.

explore_local._desc: Full browser chrome pointing at the local Style Tool dev server (localhost:9879).  Requires the PHP built-in server to be running.

wasm._desc: Full browser backed by the PHP-WASM server.  No native PHP install required.  Node.js is used to run the WASM PHP interpreter.  The WASM server starts automatically on wasm_port.

wasm_kiosk._desc: Minimal grab-bar chrome served by PHP-WASM.  Looks like a native app panel.  No PHP install required.

headless_test._desc: Dry-run only profile.  Used by CI to validate CLI argument construction without launching the binary.
